findings.summary: Prototype grid boards correctly report high footprint counts dominated by unannotated REF** pads
findings.details: The misistemote prototype grid PCBs contain hundreds to thousands of REF** drill-pad footprints forming the prototype grid. The PCB analyzer correctly counts all footprints (e.g. 893 for 83x58mm, 2786 for 115x70mm) and correctly identifies only the few genuinely annotated connectors as real components.
